title: telegram_react leaks as text + image_gen blocked in normie mode
source: Ash bug report 2026-07-04 — screenshot showing [telegram_react]{...} leaking as raw text; normie refusing image gen
current_state: telegram_react and image_gen not in normie tool_allowlist → Groq model outputs fake text tool calls for telegram_react; says 'Can't generate media here' for image gen. After image_gen succeeds in root, model outputs ![...](attachment://...) markdown that Telegram renders as raw text instead of calling telegram_send.
target_state: telegram_react, telegram_send, image_gen added to normie allowlist so tools are dispatched properly. Auto-send in _execute_tool delivers generated image to Telegram immediately after image_gen succeeds — model never needs to chain telegram_send.
